text: The Spectator Index 🇲🇾 Malaysia's economy grew by 5.3% in the first quarter of 2026. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 🇲🇾 2026年第一季度马来西亚经济增长了5.3%。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 It is believed that around 148 Iranian sailors are missing aboard the Iranian frigate "Deena," a "Mowj" class vessel, which sank off the southwest coast of Sri Lanka, most likely after being attacked by a US submarine. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇰 🇮🇷 Sri Lanka has repatriated 238 Iranian sailors, including 32 injured in a U.S. submarine attack that sank the Iranian warship IRIS Dena in early March. Authorities said 87 bodies were recovered after the strike, while survivors from a second Iranian vessel that later docked in Sri Lanka were also sent home this week. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 据信，约有148名伊朗水手在伊朗护卫舰“迪纳号”（Deena，一艘“莫杰”级舰艇）上失踪，该舰在斯里兰卡西南海岸沉没，极有可能是遭到了美国潜艇的攻击。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇰 🇮🇷 斯里兰卡已遣返了238名伊朗水手，其中包括32名在3月初美国潜艇袭击导致伊朗军舰IRIS Dena号沉没事件中受伤的人员。当局表示，袭击后已打捞出87具遗体，而本周从另一艘随后停靠在斯里兰卡的伊朗船只上的幸存者也已被送回国。@wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The U.S. Navy’s Blue Angels and U.S. Air Force’s Thunderbirds, two of the nation’s most elite flight teams, united Tuesday to perform an extremely rare formation flyover in “Super Delta” over Pensacola Beach, Florida. https://x.com/TerriGreenUSA/status/2044170679143031258/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender ：美国海军“蓝天使”飞行表演队和美国空军“雷鸟”飞行表演队，这两支国家最精锐的飞行表演队，周二在佛罗里达州彭萨科拉海滩上空罕见地联合进行了“超级三角洲”编队飞行。https://x.com/TerriGreenUSA/status/2044170679143031258/video/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) conducts U.S. blockade operations in the Arabian Sea, April 16. The ship's embarked carrier air wing includes eight F-35C stealth fighters, F/A-18 fighter jets, EA-18G electronic attack aircraft, E-2D command and control planes, MH-60 helicopters and CMV-22B Ospreys for logistics support. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰（CVN 72）于4月16日在阿拉伯海执行美国封锁行动。该舰搭载的舰载机联队包括8架F-35C隐身战斗机、F/A-18战斗机、EA-18G电子战飞机、E-2D预警指挥机、MH-60直升机以及用于后勤支援的CMV-22B“鱼鹰”运输机。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 With over 92% of ballots counted in Peru’s presidential election, left-wing candidate Roberto Sánchez has moved into second place with about 12%, overtaking Rafael López Aliaga, while Keiko Fujimori leads with nearly 17%. The top two will advance to…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Peru presidential candidate Rafael López Aliaga called on supporters to take to the streets on April 19 in Lima, urging mass turnout “to defend democracy” and protest the election results. The right-wing candidate, currently polling in third place, has repeatedly alleged the vote is rigged. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 秘鲁总统大选已统计超过 92% 的选票，左翼候选人罗伯托·桑切斯（Roberto Sánchez）以约 12% 的得票率升至第二位，超过了拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿利亚加（Rafael López Aliaga），而藤森庆子（Keiko Fujimori）以近 17% 的得票率领先。得票率最高的前两名将进入……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 秘鲁总统候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿利亚加呼吁支持者于 4 月 19 日在利马走上街头，敦促民众大规模参与“捍卫民主”并抗议选举结果。这位目前民调排名第三的右翼候选人一再声称选举存在舞弊。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 I do not see a ceasefire anywhere. I see a regrouping. I see thousands of U.S. soldiers being shipped to the region in an attempt to try infiltrating again where they already failed last time. I see Zionist Israel claiming to stop aerial bombardment against Lebanon but clear as day attempting to gain grounds during this hasty ceasefire when it miserably failed otherwise. But..I also see the IRGC locked and loaded. And I see Hezbollah resistance steadfast and ready more than ever to rub the nose of the occupation in southern Lebanese dirt, if they as much as peep their heads. I see dark days ahead but certainly, I see the light of victory at the end of this tunnel of colonialism and occupation. صبراٌ جميلاً وبالله المستعان. ✍️ Marwa Osman
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 我没看到任何地方有停火。我看到的是重组。我看到成千上万的美国士兵被运往该地区，试图再次渗透他们上次已经失败的地方。我看到犹太复国主义以色列声称停止对黎巴嫩的空中轰炸，但显然是在这次仓促的停火期间试图获得地面进展，因为他们在其他方面惨遭失败。但是……我也看到伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）已蓄势待发。我看到真主党抵抗力量比以往任何时候都更加坚定和准备就绪，如果占领军敢露头，就让他们在黎巴嫩南部的泥土中丢尽颜面。我预见前方黑暗的日子，但毫无疑问，我在这条殖民主义和占领的隧道尽头看到了胜利的曙光。耐心等待，求主相助。✍️ Marwa Osman

text: Daily summary on the key news of the past few days! - Direct talks between Lebanon and Israel in Washington. - The Lebanese Amal Movement rejects today's Israeli-Lebanese talks in Washington. - The genocide has not stopped in Gaza. - Russian Security Council claims that the US and Israel may use negotiations to prepare a ground operation in Iran. - Pakistani Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir met with Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. - 2 more US-sanctioned tankers broke through the blockade. - The recent visits by Pakistani officials to Iran and other Arab countries were part of their ongoing efforts to establish ceasefire in Lebanon in the framework of peace talks between Iran and the United States.
text_zh: 过去几天重点新闻每日摘要！- 黎巴嫩与以色列在华盛顿进行直接会谈。- 黎巴嫩阿迈勒运动拒绝今天在华盛顿举行的以黎会谈。- 加沙的种族灭绝尚未停止。- 俄罗斯安全委员会声称，美国和以色列可能利用谈判为对伊朗的地面行动做准备。- 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫。- 另有2艘受美国制裁的油轮突破了封锁。- 巴基斯坦官员近期对伊朗及其他阿拉伯国家的访问，是他们为在伊朗与美国和平谈判框架内实现黎巴嫩停火所做持续努力的一部分。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Amid the ceasefire, Iran moves all schools online from April 21; kindergartens are shut until further notice, with penalties for in-person activity violations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 在停火期间，伊朗宣布从4月21日起所有学校转为线上教学；幼儿园关闭直至另行通知，违反规定进行线下活动将受到处罚。

text: 🐻 Here's all the important news of the past 24 hours - just for you! ➡️ Russia carried out a major attack on Kiev and some other major Ukrainian cities ➡️ The TCC got to witness a miracle ➡️ Pete Hegseth uses a fake Bible verse from "Pulp Fiction" for a prayer and scolds US media ➡️ Russia delivered a record volume of gas to Spain in the first month of the Middle East conflict, according to El País . ➡️ Alex Jones definitely doesn't like Trump anymore , and Trump hates Joe Kent ➡️ Trump Administration plans for the "The United States Triumphal Arch" ➡️ Russian Security Council Secretary Sergey Shoigu reminded Finland and the Baltic states about Russia’s right to self-defense in connection with Ukrainian drone strikes on Russia via the territory of these countries. ➡️ Trump announces a 10-day ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel , and makes a bunch of strange statements, for example, that the blockade is amazing , and the Pope essentially wants Iran to have nuclear weapons . Oh - and that they apparently have a very good relationship with Iran now ➡️ US State Department comments on the ceasefire between Lebanon and Israel, and it doesn't sound promising . Netanyahu announces they are not leaving Lebanon ➡️ Zelensky wants Europe to send Ukrainian refugees to the front ➡️ Head of Israeli Communications says "facts don't matter anymore" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 这是过去24小时内所有重要新闻，专为您准备！ ➡️ 俄罗斯对基辅及乌克兰其他一些主要城市发动了大规模袭击 ➡️ 乌克兰征兵中心（TCC）见证了奇迹 ➡️ 皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在祈祷时引用了《低俗小说》中的伪造圣经经文，并斥责美国媒体 ➡️ 据《国家报》报道，在中东冲突的第一个月，俄罗斯向西班牙输送了创纪录的天然气量。 ➡️ 亚历克斯·琼斯（Alex Jones）显然不再喜欢特朗普了，而特朗普讨厌乔·肯特（Joe Kent） ➡️ 特朗普政府计划建造“美国凯旋门” ➡️ 俄罗斯联邦安全会议秘书谢尔盖·绍伊古提醒芬兰和波罗的海国家，鉴于乌克兰通过这些国家的领土对俄罗斯进行无人机袭击，俄罗斯有权进行自卫。 ➡️ 特朗普宣布黎巴嫩和以色列之间停火10天，并发表了一系列奇怪的言论，例如称封锁是“了不起的”，并声称教皇本质上希望伊朗拥有核武器。哦，还有他说他们现在与伊朗的关系非常好 ➡️ 美国国务院就黎巴嫩和以色列之间的停火发表评论，听起来并不乐观。内塔尼亚胡宣布他们不会撤出黎巴嫩 ➡️ 泽连斯基希望欧洲将乌克兰难民送往前线 ➡️ 以色列通信部长称“事实不再重要了” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 The 414th Unmanned Strike Aviation Brigade, also known as Madyar's Birds, launched coordinated strike on April 16 targeting 16 Russian military sites across occupied territories, including Crimea, Donetsk, and Zaporizhzhia. the operation focused on air defence systems, Iskander missile bases, oil depots, and logistics infrastructure, with systems such as Pantsir, Osa-AK, and Buk-M1 being targeted. The strikes also targeted two bases associated with Iskander operational-tactical missile systems in Crimea, along with fuel storage facilities and a repair plant linked to Russia’s Black Sea Fleet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 第414无人打击航空旅，又称“马迪亚尔之鸟”（Madyar's Birds），于4月16日对被占领土上的16个俄罗斯军事目标发动了协同打击，包括克里米亚、顿涅茨克和扎波罗热。此次行动重点打击了防空系统、伊斯坎德尔导弹基地、油库和后勤基础设施，目标包括“铠甲”（Pantsir）、“黄蜂-AK”（Osa-AK）和“山毛榉-M1”（Buk-M1）等系统。打击行动还针对了克里米亚与伊斯坎德尔战役战术导弹系统相关的两个基地，以及与俄罗斯黑海舰队相关的燃料储存设施和维修厂。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Two months in Iran & winning! — Trump Contrary to what Trump said, NY Times claims ’Trump’s imposed war’ on Iran is weakening the US in 4 ways: - Depletion of costly US weapons stockpiles - Strain on relations with allies - Erosion of America’s moral authority - Expansion of Iran’s influence over the global oil market
text_zh: 🇺🇸 在伊朗待了两个月并取得胜利！——特朗普 与特朗普所言相反，《纽约时报》声称特朗普对伊朗发动的“战争”正在从四个方面削弱美国：- 耗尽了昂贵的美国武器库存 - 盟友关系紧张 - 美国道德权威的丧失 - 伊朗在全球石油市场影响力的扩大

text: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 The World Banking Group has announced they're resuming dealings with Venezuela after they were frozen in 2019, opening the opportunity for economic support loans. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇻🇪 世界银行集团宣布，在2019年冻结与委内瑞拉的往来后，现已恢复相关业务，这为提供经济援助贷款创造了机会。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 Reuters: U.S. officials have informed European counterparts that some previously contracted weapons deliveries are likely to be delayed due to the ongoing war with Iran. The delays will affect several European countries, including those in the Baltic region and Scandinavia, and are a result of the U.S. drawing on its weapons stocks to support the war effort. The U.S. has been pushing European NATO partners to purchase more U.S.-made materiel, but the delays are causing frustration in European capitals, with some officials looking at alternative weapons systems made within Europe. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇪🇺 路透社：美国官员已告知欧洲同行，由于与伊朗的战争持续，此前签订的一些武器交付合同可能会推迟。这些延误将影响包括波罗的海地区和斯堪的纳维亚国家在内的多个欧洲国家，这是美国为支持战争而动用其武器库存的结果。美国一直敦促欧洲北约伙伴购买更多美国制造的装备，但这些延误引起了欧洲各国首都的不满，一些官员正在考虑欧洲本土制造的替代武器系统。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says his administration will probe the disappearance/death of 10 scientists, calling them “very important,” and expects clarity within a week. These scientists were working in sensitive fields such as nuclear and aerospace.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普表示，他的政府将调查10名科学家的失踪/死亡事件，称他们“非常重要”，并预计在一周内查明真相。这些科学家此前在核能和航空航天等敏感领域工作。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 A U.S. Navy MQ-4C is survielling around Cuba this evening, now circling the Havana area. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump compares Operation Epic Fury with previous U.S. wars: "You don't see it so much because of what's going on in Iran, which is really you know, it's been two months. I mean, two months, you've been in other wars for eighteen years.…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 U.S. President Trump claims that the U.S. has higher oil production than Saudi Arabia and Russia combined. "We have more oil production than Russia and Saudi Arabia by far, Russia and Saudi Arabia put together, if you add them up together, And by next year, it will be double that amount." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普将“史诗之怒”行动与美国以往的战争进行了比较：“你没怎么看到它，因为伊朗那边发生的事情，真的，你知道，已经两个月了。我的意思是，两个月，你们在其他战争中已经待了十八年……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇸🇦 🇷🇺 美国总统特朗普声称，美国的石油产量超过沙特阿拉伯和俄罗斯的总和。“我们的石油产量远远超过俄罗斯和沙特阿拉伯，如果把俄罗斯和沙特阿拉伯加在一起，而且到明年，产量将是现在的两倍。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CBS: US intelligence agencies have detected signs that China is considering providing Iran with advanced radar systems, which could enhance Iran's ability to detect and track incoming threats. US officials have expressed concern that the conflict is drawing in not only regional adversaries but also global competitors willing to provide critical support, short of direct military involvement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 CBS：美国情报机构已发现迹象表明，中国正在考虑向伊朗提供先进的雷达系统，这可能会增强伊朗探测和跟踪来袭威胁的能力。美国官员表示担忧，称这场冲突不仅吸引了地区对手，还吸引了愿意提供关键支持（但不直接参与军事行动）的全球竞争对手。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump reports that the U.S. intercepted 111 Iranian rockets fired at a U.S. ship participating in Operation Epic Fury. "We had 111 rockets shot at one of our ships. I won't name the ship, but it was a beauty. And out of the 111 rockets…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump compares Operation Epic Fury with previous U.S. wars: "You don't see it so much because of what's going on in Iran, which is really you know, it's been two months. I mean, two months, you've been in other wars for eighteen years. Four years with me. I'm in there for a month. Well, he said he'd get out a month. Seventeen years in Vietnam, and five years in Afghanistan, and more much more than that. And all these different places and I said, we were in there for two months. And you know what? We're gonna have victory very shortly." @wfwitnes
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普报告称，美国拦截了伊朗向一艘参与‘史诗愤怒行动’（Operation Epic Fury）的美国军舰发射的111枚火箭弹。‘有111枚火箭弹射向我们的一艘军舰。我不会说出这艘船的名字，但它是一艘漂亮的船。在111枚火箭弹中……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普将‘史诗愤怒行动’与美国之前的战争进行了比较：“你没怎么看到它，因为伊朗正在发生的事情，实际上你知道，已经两个月了。我的意思是，两个月，你们在其他战争中已经待了十八年。我任期四年。我进去才一个月。好吧，他说他一个月就能出来。在越南待了十七年，在阿富汗待了五年，远不止这些。所有这些不同的地方，我说，我们在那里待了两个月。你知道吗？我们很快就会取得胜利。” @wfwitnes

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on the U.S.'s progress in the conflict with Iran: "But we do very well. You noticed that. You were doing very well, and I will say the war in Iran is going along swimmingly. We can do whatever we want. And it should be it should…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reports that the U.S. intercepted 111 Iranian rockets fired at a U.S. ship participating in Operation Epic Fury. "We had 111 rockets shot at one of our ships. I won't name the ship, but it was a beauty. And out of the 111 rockets shot, all 111 were shot down—these things move at about 3,000 miles an hour. You know, it's not like, oh, gee, we have plenty of time to think about it. Every single one of them, all 111, were all shot down. Think of that. Shot down." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普谈及美国在伊朗冲突中的进展：‘但我们做得非常好。你注意到了。你们做得非常好，我要说的是，伊朗战争进展得非常顺利。我们可以做任何我们想做的事。它应该……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普报告称，美国拦截了伊朗向一艘参与‘史诗愤怒行动’的美国军舰发射的111枚火箭弹。‘有111枚火箭弹射向我们的一艘军舰。我不会说出这艘船的名字，但它是一艘漂亮的船。在射出的111枚火箭弹中，全部111枚都被击落了——这些东西以每小时约3000英里的速度移动。你知道，这不像，哦，天哪，我们有充足的时间去思考。每一枚，全部111枚，都被击落了。想想看。被击落了。’” @wfwitness

text: Trump: We had to do a little journey down to Iran. I didn’t want to do that, but we had to because we can’t let them have a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们不得不去伊朗走一趟。我不想那样做，但我们必须这样做，因为我们不能让他们拥有核武器。

text: Head of Israeli Communications says "facts don't matter anymore" "The truth doesn't matter anymore. The facts don't matter anymore. I wasn't always like this. I became like this." Eli Hazan, new director of Netanyahu's Press Office and former Likud spokesperson: "I fabricate fake news as a response to them...we need to be Trump." "These people don't understand good. They only understand war. And you want war on the networks? We will give you war on the networks." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 以色列通讯主管称“事实不再重要”：“真相不再重要。事实不再重要。我并不总是这样。我变成了这样。” 内塔尼亚胡新闻办公室新任主任、前利库德集团发言人伊莱·哈赞（Eli Hazan）：“我制造假新闻作为对他们的回应……我们需要成为特朗普。” “这些人不懂得善良。他们只懂战争。你们想要网络上的战争吗？我们会给你们网络上的战争。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The war in Iran is going along swimmingly. We can do whatever we want. It’s perfect. It should be ending pretty soon.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗战争进展得非常顺利。我们可以做任何我们想做的事。这很完美。它应该很快就会结束。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on the U.S.'s progress in the conflict with Iran: "But we do very well. You noticed that. You were doing very well, and I will say the war in Iran is going along swimmingly. We can do whatever we want. And it should be it should be ending pretty soon. It was perfect. I mean, it's perfect. It was the power we have, our military. Are the most powerful military anywhere in the world. I built it four years my first four years." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及美国在与伊朗冲突中的进展：“但我们做得非常好。你注意到了。你们做得很好，我会说伊朗的战争进展得非常顺利。我们可以做任何我们想做的事。而且它应该很快就会结束。这很完美。我的意思是，这很完美。这是我们拥有的力量，我们的军队。是世界上任何地方最强大的军队。我在前四年里建立了它。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: They come up with these crazy ideas, like McDonald’s and the garbage truck—we do these things in politics. They are a little embarrassing.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们想出这些疯狂的主意，比如麦当劳和垃圾车——我们在政治中做这些事情。它们有点令人尴尬。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army has issued a new statement regarding citizens returning to the South following multiple violations by the IDF: The army command renewed its call for citizens to refrain from returning to southern villages and towns due to ongoing…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese army has begun deploying across the entrances of Dahieh to prevent security tensions following the reckless shooting that resulted in stray bullets landing in the Beirut administration area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队就公民在以色列国防军多次违规后返回南部发表了新声明：军方指挥部再次呼吁公民不要返回南部村庄和城镇，因为……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队已开始在达希耶（Dahieh）各入口部署，以防止因鲁莽射击导致流弹落入贝鲁特行政区而引发的安全紧张局势。 @wfwitness

text: Trump on Zohran Mamdani: Look at New York. He's a nice guy, calls me all the time, says hi. But his policies are no good.
text_zh: 特朗普谈佐兰·马姆达尼（Zohran Mamdani）：看看纽约。他是个好人，经常给我打电话，问候我。但他的政策不行。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 Footage from the entrance of the town of Ghazieh Southern Lebanon as residents return home. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Army has issued a new statement regarding citizens returning to the South following multiple violations by the IDF: The army command renewed its call for citizens to refrain from returning to southern villages and towns due to ongoing violations of the ceasefire, including Israeli strikes and intermittent shelling affecting multiple areas. The statement urged residents to comply with instructions from deployed military units, particularly at night, and to avoid approaching dangerous zones. The army added it is continuing to monitor developments and take necessary measures to ensure civilian safety. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部加齐耶（Ghazieh）镇入口处居民返回家园的画面。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩军队就公民在以色列国防军多次违规后返回南部发表了新声明：军方指挥部再次呼吁公民不要返回南部村庄和城镇，因为停火协议持续受到侵犯，包括以色列的袭击和影响多个地区的间歇性炮击。声明敦促居民遵守部署的军事单位的指示，特别是在夜间，并避免靠近危险区域。军方补充说，它正在继续监测事态发展并采取必要措施以确保平民安全。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Despite Zionist threats, roads and bridges are being cleared and repaired, including the Qasmiyeh bridge targeted last week. All done by civilian Un forces and the Lebanese army complied with the Zionist threats.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 尽管有犹太复国主义者的威胁，道路和桥梁正在被清理和修复，包括上周被袭击的卡斯米耶（Qasmiyeh）大桥。所有工作均由平民力量完成，黎巴嫩军队遵守了犹太复国主义者的威胁。

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Lebanese Army released a statement regarding an incident in Tripoli where one soldier was killed and two others injured intervening in an armed dispute in the Sunni majority neighbourhood of Bab al-Tabbaneh. An army patrol came under fire on April 17 in the Bab al-Tabbaneh area of Tripoli while intervening to contain an armed dispute, resulting in the death of one soldier and the injury of two others. The army has since cordoned off the area and launched raids to apprehend those responsible, with investigations underway under judicial supervision. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩军队就的黎波里发生的一起事件发表声明，一名士兵在干预逊尼派占多数的巴布·塔巴内（Bab al-Tabbaneh）社区的武装纠纷时丧生，另有两人受伤。4月17日，一支军队巡逻队在的黎波里巴布·塔巴内地区干预并控制一起武装纠纷时遭到枪击，导致一名士兵死亡，两人受伤。此后，军队封锁了该地区并展开突袭以逮捕肇事者，调查正在司法监督下进行。 @wfwitness

text: Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons resigns. He will stay on until May 31st. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）代理局长托德·莱昂斯（Todd Lyons）辞职。他将留任至5月31日。来源：福克斯新闻

text: 🇱🇧 Trump says Hezbollah better behave! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 特朗普称真主党最好安分点！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: Pre war planning by Iranian officials for contingencies, such as replacing military leaders should one be killed, helped blunt the impact of U.S. and Israeli strikes on military infrastructure. Preemptive operation planning was also able to mitagte the extent of the destruction of Iran's drone and missile capabilities. European and Gulf officials report that Iran retains a solid long range missile reserve. Israel estimated that Iran had 2,500 ballistic missiles before the recent conflict, with Gulf officials reporting that Iran has fired at least 1,850 missiles so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 彭博社：伊朗官员针对突发状况（如军事领导人被杀后的继任问题）所做的战前规划，有助于减轻美国和以色列对军事基础设施打击的影响。先发制人的行动规划也减轻了伊朗无人机和导弹能力被破坏的程度。欧洲和海湾地区官员报告称，伊朗仍保留着稳固的远程导弹储备。以色列估计伊朗在近期冲突前拥有2500枚弹道导弹，海湾地区官员报告称伊朗迄今已发射了至少1850枚导弹。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah official to NBC: "Any Israeli breach of the ceasefire will be met with a military response from the resistance." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党官员对NBC表示：“任何以色列对停火协议的破坏都将遭到抵抗力量的军事回应。” 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. forces are forward and ready across the Middle East, including America's 🇺🇸 Air Force. U.S. Air Force F-16 Fighting Falcons conduct a readiness flight in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044923794880618707/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国军队在中东地区处于前沿部署并随时待命，包括美国的 🇺🇸 空军。美国空军的F-16“战隼”战斗机在美国中央司令部责任区进行战备飞行。 https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2044923794880618707/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @marklevinshow : Some facts and questions worth thinking about: 1. Lebanese armed forces cannot stop Hezbollah 2. The IDF was destroying Hezbollah 3. How does a ceasefire between Israel and the government of Lebanon or a peace deal stop Hezbollah? 4. A ceasefire means Israel stops destroying Hezbollah since the Lebanese army and Israel and not fighting each other 5. The Iranian regime is on the ropes thanks to the military offensive and now the blockade 6. If reports are correct, the Iranian regime demanded Israel stop destroying Hezbollah as a condition of negotiating again with us, thereby linking Hezbollah's survival to that of the Iranian regime. 7. Do we want the Iranian regime and Hezbollah to survive? If so, why? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转推 @marklevinshow ：一些值得思考的事实和问题：1. 黎巴嫩武装部队无法阻止真主党 2. 以色列国防军（IDF）当时正在摧毁真主党 3. 以色列与黎巴嫩政府之间的停火或和平协议如何能阻止真主党？ 4. 停火意味着以色列停止摧毁真主党，因为黎巴嫩军队和以色列之间并没有在交战 5. 由于军事攻势和现在的封锁，伊朗政权已陷入困境 6. 如果报道属实，伊朗政权要求以色列停止摧毁真主党作为与我们重新谈判的条件，从而将真主党的生存与伊朗政权的生存联系在一起。 7. 我们希望伊朗政权和真主党生存下去吗？如果是，为什么？ 推文
